name: InfiniteMenu
description: A WebGL-powered 3D spherical menu where items are arranged on the surface of a rotating icosahedron. Users drag to rotate the sphere and click items to navigate. Each item displays an image, title, and description.

items.type: Array<{ image: string; link: string; title: string; description: string }>
items.description: Array of menu items. Each item has an image URL, navigation link, title, and description text.

scale.description: Scale factor for the 3D sphere size.

examples.title: Basic menu

aiPromptHint: InfiniteMenu MUST be wrapped in a container with explicit height and position:relative. Items are displayed on a 3D sphere that the user can drag to rotate. Each item needs image, link, title, and description fields.
